final:
module RefModule(input [2:0] speed_input,  
                            input clk,  
                            output reg [2:0] speed_output);  

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        speed_output <= speed_input;  
    end  
endmodule
